title: Port pop_pending and pop_error stack ops
description: Port ts_stack_pop_pending and ts_stack_pop_error from C stack.c. pop_pending handles fragile/pending nodes during reduce for proper incremental reparsing. pop_error pops single error subtree from stack top. Include unit tests.
close_reason: Implemented PopPending and PopError in stack.go, integrated PopError into recoverToState. Pushed on feat/pop-pending-error (563bedc). 6 unit tests, no regressions.
